analysis.btc_price_note: BTC ~$78,000 on Apr 24 (range $76K-$78.5K past 24h). Momentum stalling below $80K key resistance. Fear & Greed 46 (fear zone).
sentiment_key_signals: Fear & Greed Index: 46 (Fear zone, 3rd consecutive session below 50)
BTC dominance 58.1% rising — capital rotating into BTC as defensive crypto asset
Spot BTC ETF: 5 consecutive days of inflows, $238M net on Apr 21; total AUM $96.5B
Strategy (Saylor) bought 34,164 BTC ($2.54B) on Apr 20 — largest since 2024
Goldman Sachs + Morgan Stanley filing new spot BTC ETFs — long-term bullish
US-Iran ceasefire extended indefinitely but talks stalled; Hormuz still at risk
KelpDAO $292M DeFi exploit — DeFi TVL -$14B, altcoin sentiment fragile
24h volume $107.16B below 30-day avg — low conviction in current move
CPI March 2026 release Apr 24 — first print to fully capture post-Hormuz energy spike
FOMC Apr 28-29 — J.P. Morgan expects hold at 3.50-3.75%; leadership transition risk
FOMC minutes for March 18 decision release Apr 24
analysis.macro_backdrop: Fed funds 3.50-3.75% (on hold). March CPI due Apr 24 — energy-driven spike risk. FOMC Apr 28-29 — hold expected but Fed leadership transition adds uncertainty. GENIUS Act stablecoin law enacted. SEC shifted to non-enforcement approach for crypto.
analysis.technical_note: BTC $78,000 — consolidating below $80K psychological resistance. Strong institutional demand (ETF inflows, Strategy mega-buy) vs. macro uncertainty (CPI, FOMC, geopolitics). Confidence 0.45 = below 0.50 bot threshold — macro filter INACTIVE this cycle.
analysis.regime_rationale: Neutral: Institutional demand (ETF 5-day inflows, Strategy $2.54B, Goldman/Morgan Stanley ETF filings) and regulatory clarity offset by Fear & Greed 46, pending CPI (bearish risk if hot), Iran-Hormuz oil risk, DeFi exploit contagion fears, FOMC caution window.
